_doc: docs/pins/tdlr-tabs-projects.travis.json — REGISTRY MODE input for the TDLR/TABS adapter (Travis County). Project numbers only; every fact about a project comes from a live fetch of its record page at refresh time — this file asserts existence, nothing else. Provenance: numbers transcribed from TDLR TABS pages shown in The Drey Dossier (youtube.com/watch?v=Lh_0v3nuczE, Jul 2026). STEP-0: re-verify each URL resolves live before the first refresh; a number that 404s is removed here, never guessed.
